objective: Close BuilderOS autonomy-truth gaps without adding a second queue: Point B, build/repair PASS, receipt sync, self-repair, deploy truth, and founder UI proof must all fail closed until the required evidence exists.

core_design.one_queue: builderos-reboot/BP_PRIORITY.json remains the only active product queue.
core_design.active_point_b: builderos-reboot/POINT_B_TARGET.json defines current program lock and founder success test.
core_design.rule: No caller may collapse these states. TECHNICAL_PASS can satisfy machine-path progress but cannot complete Point B while founder_usability_pass is false.
core_design.mechanical_strategy: Create shared helpers/gates, then wire existing scheduler, runner, readiness, acceptance, founder build, and deploy paths to the helpers. Do not duplicate local completion logic.

new_or_refactored_shared_contracts.purpose: Single source for mission completion, queue incomplete work, Point B closure, and readiness labels.
hard_rules: queue_complete_for_scheduler is false when current Point B mission founder_usability_pass is not true.
POINT_B_COMPLETE requires target mission id match, technical pass, founder_usability_pass true, and objective verdict synchronized.
Readiness labels must include TECHNICAL_PASS_ONLY when technical pass exists without founder pass.

new_or_refactored_shared_contracts.purpose: No build or repair PASS unless exact commit, origin/main transport, and required deploy truth are explicit.
hard_rules: If deploy_required is true, COMMIT_ONLY_NOT_LIVE cannot be PASS.
If origin_contains_commit is false, build/repair status is FAIL even when local commit exists.
If Railway serves an older deploy_sha, the system must say not live.

new_or_refactored_shared_contracts.purpose: Every accepted reality change updates receipts, BP_PRIORITY, OBJECTIVE_VERDICT, product readiness, and twin/state artifacts in the same governed action.

live_deploy_change: products/receipts/UI_ALPHA_GATE.json when UI proof is rerun

hard_rules: A receipt that says PASS without reality_sync.applied_paths is invalid.
A stale generated report must include stale=true or be regenerated before use as KNOW.
No department certifies its own work without an independent verification receipt.

new_or_refactored_shared_contracts.purpose: Founder UI path becomes a first-class acceptance authority, including exact founder prompts that previously failed.

minimum_cases.prompt: can you tell me how many calories are in a twisted tea?
must_not_route_to: COUNSEL ONLY / Rendered overview display from live system data
must_return: uncertainty or web-search label if live search unavailable

minimum_cases.prompt: what is point b right now?
must_include: founder_usability_pass false or awaiting founder confirmation when false

minimum_cases.prompt: do: make a harmless scoped proof change
must_include_when_pass: origin/main proof or explicit not-live status
deploy truth when live proof is required

new_or_refactored_shared_contracts.purpose: Use founder doctrine for all repair loops: lessons carry-forward, three-attempt pattern, research and consensus escalation.

attempt_policy.attempt_1: same-tier repair with current receipts and local code truth
attempt_policy.attempt_2: same-tier repair with explicit prior lesson carry-forward
attempt_policy.attempt_3: expanded repair with research and consensus context
attempt_policy.after_attempt_3: add another model or authority tier and repeat the three-attempt pattern

new_or_refactored_shared_contracts.purpose: Convert improvement proposals into ARC-ready deltas consumed by the active blueprint path, not advisory-only summaries.
hard_rules: P0 improvement proposals block healthy-idle status until resolved, parked with owner, or converted into a BP delta.
Improvement loop cannot create a queue; it annotates the active BP/Point B path only.
Recurring failure families must produce prevention hooks or a governed blocked return.
wire_to: builderos-reboot/BP_PRIORITY.json receipts only through existing sync path

blueprint_steps.title: Install shared completion semantics
blueprint_steps.decision_authority: ARC defines states; CDR only implements exact helper and tests
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: Define technical_pass, founder_usability_pass, point_b_complete, queue_complete_for_scheduler, and readiness_state from BP_PRIORITY plus POINT_B_TARGET plus objective verdicts.

blueprint_steps.title: Wire scheduler and never-stop runner to completion helper
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: Remove local TECHNICAL_PASS/PASS completion checks. Scheduler healthy idle requires no incomplete queue work and current Point B complete or founder_stop active.

blueprint_steps.title: Add transport proof contract
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: Centralize commit SHA, origin/main, deploy SHA, and live behavior proof semantics. Return explicit COMMIT_ONLY_NOT_LIVE vs DEPLOY_SYNC_PASS vs LIVE_BEHAVIOR_PASS.
blocked_if_coder_must_decide: whether deploy lag can still PASS

blueprint_steps.title: Apply transport proof to founder build and generic builder completion
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: No PASS-like status can be returned from build/repair without transport proof appropriate to the action. Missing SHA, missing origin proof, or stale deploy becomes FAIL or explicit NOT_LIVE.

blueprint_steps.title: Install reality sync contract
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: Make receipt/state/twin sync a required proof object. Generated reports include source registry hash, BP hash, Point B hash, deploy SHA, generated_at, and stale marker.

blueprint_steps.title: Harden product readiness freshness
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: Read all products from PRODUCT_REGISTRY, mark stale reports, and expose TECHNICAL_PASS_ONLY vs POINT_B_COMPLETE without hiding founder false.

blueprint_steps.title: Upgrade founder-surface regression corpus
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: Exact founder path and prompt failures become durable tests. Generic green cannot overrule corpus failure.
blocked_if_coder_must_decide: what answer quality is acceptable for founder prompt
whether fake overview text is allowed

blueprint_steps.title: Separate alpha-ready from Point B closed in UI gate
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: UI gate may return CLEARED_FOR_FOUNDER_ALPHA, but Point B remains incomplete until founder_usability_pass true. Every receipt and UI label must say this explicitly.

blueprint_steps.title: Replace weaker self-repair attempt law
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: All repair loops use three-attempt doctrine with lessons, receipts, local truth, research, consensus, then tier expansion. Two-attempt cap becomes illegal except for non-repairable hard stops.

blueprint_steps.title: Convert improvement loop from advisory to blocking deltas
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: P0 improvement proposals must be consumed as ARC-ready deltas, parked with owner/risk, or block healthy idle. No secondary queue.

blueprint_steps.title: Authority drift scanner for active machine paths
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: Active runtime files must point at product-home/queue/Point B authority, not amendment-era @ssot, unless explicitly marked history or law anchor.

blueprint_steps.title: Fix or remove dead alpha confirm alias
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: The npm alias builderos:alpha:confirm must reference an existing script that drives founder usability confirm, or be removed from active proof surfaces.

blueprint_steps.title: Certification lock
blueprint_steps.implementation_intent: FULLY_MACHINE_READY remains false until same-tier determinism, closure acceptance, deploy/runtime truth, and founder UI proof all pass. The verifier fails if the flag is upgraded prematurely.

required: blueprint steps executed without unauthorized decisions
all code-changing steps have transport proof
reality_sync applied to receipts and state artifacts
SNT translation attack has no unresolved blocker
LifeRE target mission technical acceptance pass
founder_usability_pass true from founder-confirm path with quote
acceptance and alpha readiness receipts synced
product readiness regenerated from current registry
founder UI path receipt references exact canonical URL and daily cycle/top-3/debrief visibility
explicitly_not_enough: UI alpha cleared for founder testing
scripted browser pass without founder confirmation

required: Point B closure if release claim is LifeRE Alpha complete
no false healthy-idle when Point B incomplete
founder UI regression corpus pass on live deploy

candidate_confidence.basis: Direct reads of required authority files plus active services/scripts/receipts. No canonical BLUEPRINT.json read.
